name: Baked Pasta and Cheese Supreme
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups shredded Cheddar or Colby cheese (6 ounces)
1/2 cup fresh bread crumbs (from 1 slice of white bread)
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 400°F.
2. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
3. Meanwhile, cook bacon in a large ovenproof skillet over medium heat until crisp; drain.
4. Add onion, garlic, and 1 teaspoon oregano to the skillet; cook and stir about 3 minutes or until onion is tender. Stir in tomato sauce and hot pepper sauce.
5. Add cooked pasta and cheese to the skillet; stir to coat.
6. Combine bread crumbs, remaining 1 teaspoon oregano, and melted butter in a small bowl; sprinkle over pasta mixture.
7. Bake about 5 minutes or until hot and bubbly. Garnish, if desired.
8. Makes 4 servings
